title: Marnie's Grimmsnarl Red Team BLACK v1
intent: Real ladder-grounded Marnie's Grimmsnarl ex (card 648) Darkness deck, sourced from flm_diff/opp_grimmsnarl.csv -- the canonical Grimmsnarl opponent benchmark used throughout the project's Dragapult-era evaluation. Reused here as a Red Team adversary to screen candidates against, not to promote itself.
policy_note: Uses a generic, archetype-agnostic heuristic policy (attack > evolve > ability > energy > play > retreat > end by option kind only) -- no dedicated championship-level tuning, since this deck's role is to be a credible opponent, not a submission candidate.
